stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:harborhaven-port.fixture 2026 tariff revised berth fee effective

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate a primary source for the requested fact.
Read the primary document itself rather than relying on its search snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Return exactly `Harborhaven Port Authority | Revised berth fee | 2026-04-01 | https://fixtures.example/harborhaven-port/notices/tariff-2026-2`.
Include no citation text outside that single line.

prompt: Identify Harborhaven’s official port authority, then fetch its primary 2026 tariff notice and find the effective date of the revised berth fee. Respond exactly `Harborhaven Port Authority | Revised berth fee | YYYY-MM-DD | <primary-source URL>` with no additional prose.

search_2.query: site:harborhaven-port.fixture 2026 tariff revised berth fee effective

fetch_1.title: Tariff Notice 2026-2
fetch_1.content: Tariff Notice 2026-2 revises the standard berth fee. The revised fee takes effect on 2026-04-01.
